Created attachment 240553
update to v2.2.0

Update and move to my primary email.

Changelog:
    Add light shades, dark grey and black (#32) @hugovk
    Add __main__ to re-enable demo via python -m termcolor (#27) @hugovk

Port now doesn't work with Python3.6, please consider whether dependencies are ready to switch.
